heading: Ownership of Presidential records
label: 2202 Ownership of Presidential records
text: The United States shall reserve and retain complete ownership, possession, and control of Presidential records; and such records shall be administered in accordance with the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Effective DateSection effective with respect to Presidential records created during a term of office of President beginning on or after , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 20, 1981section 3 of Pub. L. 95–591section 2201 of this title
